name: weechat
description: WeeChat Relay protocol bridge to any IRC network via local WeeChat instance

weechat_relay_password.description: WeeChat relay password (set via /relay password in WeeChat)

prompts.label: WeeChat relay URL
prompts.help: HTTP URL for WeeChat API relay (run /relay add api 9001 in WeeChat)

prompts.label: WeeChat relay password
prompts.help: Password set via /set relay.network.password in WeeChat

prompts.label: Connection mode
prompts.help: auto (use ws_adapter if running, else HTTP), websocket (require adapter), or http (direct polling)

prompts.label: WebSocket adapter URL
prompts.help: URL of the ws_adapter.py process. Used in auto/websocket modes.

prompts.label: Allowed networks (optional)
prompts.help: Only monitor these networks (empty = all). E.g., ['libera', 'oftc']

prompts.label: Allowed senders (nicks or hostmasks)
prompts.help: List of nicks or nick!user@host patterns. Use '*' for all.

prompts.label: Verbose drop logging
prompts.help: Log the reason every time a message is silently filtered or dropped
